--- title: "Hands-on Exercise 3" author: "Huang Kuan Yu" date: "25/4/2026" date-modfified: "last-modified" format: html execute: echo: true eval: true warning: false freeze: true --- ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pacman::p_load(ggiraph, plotly, patchwork, DT, tidyverse) ``` ::: # Import Data ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} exam_data <- read_csv("data/Exam_data.csv") ``` ::: ::: panel-tabset ## The plot ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} #|echo: false p <- ggplot(data=exam_data, aes(x = MATHS)) + geom_dotplot_interactive( aes(tooltip = ID), stackgroups = TRUE, binwidth = 1, method = "histodot") + scale_y_continuous(NULL, breaks = NULL) girafe( ggobj = p, width_svg = 6, height_svg = 6*0.618 ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ## The code ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} #|eval: false p <- ggplot(data=exam_data, aes(x = MATHS)) + geom_dotplot_interactive( aes(tooltip = ID), stackgroups = TRUE, binwidth = 1, method = "histodot") + scale_y_continuous(NULL, breaks = NULL) girafe( ggobj = p, width_svg = 6, height_svg = 6*0.618 ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ::: # Display multiple information on tooltip ::: panel-tabset ## The Plot ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} #|echo: false exam_data$tooltip <- c(paste0( "Name = ", exam_data$ID, " Class = ", exam_data$CLASS)) p <- ggplot(data=exam_data, aes(x = MATHS)) + geom_dotplot_interactive( aes(tooltip = exam_data$tooltip), stackgroups = TRUE, binwidth = 1, method = "histodot") + scale_y_continuous(NULL, breaks = NULL) girafe( ggobj = p, width_svg = 8, height_svg = 8*0.618 ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ## The Code ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} #|eval: false exam_data$tooltip <- c(paste0( "Name = ", exam_data$ID, " Class = ", exam_data$CLASS)) p <- ggplot(data=exam_data, aes(x = MATHS)) + geom_dotplot_interactive( aes(tooltip = exam_data$tooltip), stackgroups = TRUE, binwidth = 1, method = "histodot") + scale_y_continuous(NULL, breaks = NULL) girafe( ggobj = p, width_svg = 8, height_svg = 8*0.618 ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: :::
